CEN Response Viewer

Response 218440398

Executed and Deployed A Regional Ozone Research Campaign During the 2025 Ozone

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Executed and deployed a regional ozone research campaign during the 2025 ozone season - Established a network of monitoring sites across Maricopa County capturing high-resolution data - Initiated analysis of key drivers of ozone including wildfire impacts and transport - Advanced collaboration ac...

Question

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question
